name: Oat Breakfast
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add oats, molasses, currants, and brown sugar to the boiling water.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes until most of the liquid is absorbed.
4. Stir occasionally.
5. Stir in cinnamon and nutmeg.
6. Cook for an additional 5-8 minutes until all liquid is absorbed (total cooking time: 15-20 minutes).
7. Serve hot.
8. For a creamy texture, stir in pumpkin puree after removing from heat.
